title: v0.6.0 component gallery and usage documentation
componentUseRules: Use the gallery only in local development through the #ui-gallery hash route.
Keep examples synthetic and task-focused; do not add domain workers, storage, audio, archive, encryption, profile, transcript, or vocabulary fixtures.
Required actions, blockers, privacy consequences, destructive consequences, and recovery text must stay visible outside tooltips, menus, toasts, and collapsed panels.
Prefer native semantics and repository-owned primitives before creating one-off application controls.
When a primitive changes, update @speech/ui/testing examples before updating feature-screen fixtures.
contentStyleRules: Visible gallery copy identifies a control, state, consequence, or accessibility rule.
Default UI examples use v0.6 terminology such as Voice model, Speech model, Vocabulary, Quality check, and Device storage.
Technical implementation terms belong in diagnostics or advanced sections, not ordinary workflow examples.
accessibilityConstraints: Gallery examples render native semantics for current primitives and feedback components.
Gallery coverage reflects keyboard, Escape, focus order, focus restoration, ARIA state, hidden focusability, pointer and touch, forced colours, reduced motion, and disabled/loading states.
Tooltips supplement labels but never own required instructions, errors, privacy terms, or destructive consequences.
Menus contain temporary action/navigation lists only; no nested submenus and no forms.
Dialogs remain short blocking decisions; long workflows belong on dedicated routes.
